frontmatter.description: Embedding stored with one model is being queried by another (dimension or distribution mismatch)

signature.embedding_seed: embedding dimension mismatch model version vector store

body:
## When this fires
A query embedding has a different dimensionality (or a different model fingerprint) than the embeddings already stored in the index. Almost always caused by a model upgrade that wasn't followed by a backfill.

## Playbook
1. Read embedding-config to confirm the model name and dimension currently in use.
2. Compare against vector-index-meta for what is actually persisted.
3. Walk recent-deploys-svc to find when the model identifier changed.
